problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: If Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus is applied to fully, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
